---
title: "readme"
author: "allisonMertin"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---
## R Markdown

# Seed microbiome comparisons between restored and natural sites

## Description
This repository contains all code used to analyse microbial community data for Microbial Ecology manuscript "Host species mediate distinct seed microbiome responses to restoration."

## Workflow
Run scripts in the following order:
1. 01_import_data.R
2. 02_decontam.R
3. 03_diversity_metrics.R
4. 04_diversity_metrics_stats.R
5. 05_PCoA.R
6. 06_barplots.R
7. 07_PERMANOVA.R
8. 08_indicator_taxa.R
9. 09_assign_functional_guilds.R
10. 10_core_microbes_and_heatmap.R

## Requirements
R version: 4.2.3

Packages:
- phyloseq
- vegan
- microbiome
- pairwiseAdonis
- EcolUtils
- ape
- decontam
- nlme
- emmeans
- dplyr
- ggplot2
- plotrix
- cowplot
- gridextra
- RColorBrewer
- svglite
- indicspecies
- plyr
- phylosmith
- tidyverse
- tidytext
- patchwork
- microeco
- pheatmap

## Notes
- Raw sequence data for both 16SrRNA and ITS2 datasets at NCBI short read archive (SRA) BioProject PRJNA1432314, 
- Example metadata are provided.
- Example asv and taxonomy files are supplied for the 16S dataset.
- All analyses rely on standard package functions as described in the associated manuscript.
